overview: Dimir Midrange in Modern balances early disruption with resilient value engines to outlast opponents. By leveraging efficient removal and card-drawing artifacts, the deck maintains board presence while refilling its hand. The goal is to trade favorably in the early game and transition into a superior resource state by the late game.
win_conditions: Efficient creature combat after early disruption
Accumulating card advantage through discard-and-draw synergies
Outvaluing opponents with resilient artifact creatures

keep_criteria: Hands with Thoughtseize and a one-drop
Hands containing Abhorrent Oculus and early interaction
Two-land hands with a disruptive spell
mulligan_criteria: Hands with only lands and late-game threats
Hands missing both disruption and low-cost value generators

early_game: Cast Thoughtseize to remove key threats or combo pieces
Play Abhorrent Oculus to generate immediate card advantage
Establish land drops while holding interaction for opponent's plays
mid_game: Deploy Agatha's Soul Cauldron to convert discards into draws
Trade creatures efficiently to maintain board parity
Use discard effects to fuel Cauldron while disrupting opponent's hand
late_game: Leverage card advantage to outdraw and outresource the opponent
Play resilient threats that are difficult to remove efficiently
Use Cauldron to refill hand and close out the game with combat or spells

key_cards.name: Agatha's Soul Cauldron
key_cards.notes: Activate when you have excess cards or need to refill after trading; synergizes with discard effects to maintain hand size while generating value.

key_cards.name: Abhorrent Oculus
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to establish a body and draw a card upon death; excellent for cycling into better cards or refilling after early disruption.

key_cards.name: Thoughtseize
key_cards.notes: Hold for key threats, combo pieces, or game-winning cards; use aggressively in the first few turns to set the opponent back.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize Thoughtseize before playing creatures to avoid trading into removal
Trigger Abhorrent Oculus death draws early to accelerate card advantage
Time Agatha's Soul Cauldron activations to avoid leaving yourself vulnerable to board wipes

matchups.advice: Hold Thoughtseize for their biggest threats and play Abhorrent Oculus early to generate value and slow their momentum.
Race with efficient threats and use Agatha's Soul Cauldron to outdraw their resource advantage.
Disrupt their key pieces immediately with Thoughtseize and use Cauldron to refill your hand for repeated interaction.
